/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/user_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/message_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/group_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/friend_manager.cpp.o -o chat_server  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lmysqlclient
